note: 06-03 window (17 completed, 76.5%): copilot-sdk-session-auth ESCALATED to CRITICAL — 100% of sdk-driver runs (3/3) failed the auth-info error, now on production main + a PR run; legacy path 0 fail. +1 safe-output target=*. token-budget-429 ABSENT.

anomalies.t: 06-02 AFTERNOON: did NOT recur (top eff_tok 23.79M < 25M cap, SUCCESS). 2nd window-level reprieve. But the 06-02 MORNING window had 2 over-cap failures, so still intermittent. Open #35661. Heavy daily-aggregation workflows keep flirting with the cap.
06-03: target=* variant recurred on Contribution Check — create_issue landed but 3 add_comment items lacked a PR number under target='*' -> job red. Class persists across windows.

CRITICAL (06-03): EVERY sdk-driver run this window failed (3/3 = 100%) with the AUTH-INFO error 'Session was not created with authentication info or custom provider' — now on 2 production main schedules (Copilot PR Prompt Pattern Analysis, Daily Project Performance Summary Generator) + 1 production PR run (PR Code Quality Reviewer). isAuthError=true, not retried, turns=0. Legacy copilot CLI path 0/14 fail. The rollout is shipping broken auth pass-through. HALT/rollback recommended. Trajectory: 06-02 morning experimental-branch auth-info (4x) -> 06-02 evening session.idle timeout on 1 prod main -> 06-03 auth-info now 100% of prod sdk runs.

06-02 afternoon window 89.4% (42/47) — back in the stable ~89-91% band after the morning window's 84.2%. 15-day daily trend (one point/day): ...89.8 -> 96.2 (06-01 peak) -> 84.2 (06-02 full-day). Afternoon slice is healthier; no 429, failures are spread across infra/experimental classes rather than one dominant mode.
anomalies.summary: 06-03 window success 76.5% (13/17). Local dip driven almost entirely by the copilot-sdk auth escalation (3 of 4 failures). Daily one-point trend: 96.2 (06-01) -> 84.2 (06-02) -> 76.5 (06-03 window). NOT a broad regression: remove the 3 sdk-driver auth failures and the legacy path is 13/14 = 92.9%.

anomalies.t: Cost top 06-03: Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer $2.52 / 9.97M eff / 32 turns (SUCCESS). Then Team Evolution $1.45, Caveman Optimizer $1.19, Lockfile Stats $0.94. Total $6.75 claude-measured (copilot/codex EstimatedCost=0). No >$6 outlier this window; Semantic Function Refactoring (06-02 $6.35) did not run/recur.

06-03: firewall 69/544 (12.7%), all 69 blocks are '(unknown)' SNI (by-design). Per-workflow hotspot matt-pocock-skills-reviewer 12/45 (27%). No new-engine smoke probes this window. No firewall-caused failures. No action.
Did NOT recur 06-02 (2 consecutive quiet windows). Harden-the-cp preventive stays open (shared detection harness exposes every create_pull_request workflow).
Did NOT recur 06-02 (2 consecutive quiet windows). External-cause transient; checkout skip-cleanly guard remains a low-priority idea.

NEW: Daily Issues Report Generator 26831132205 agent exit 127 — copilot_harness 'node runtime missing on this runner' guard fired. Runner lacked usable node. Pre-agent infra, single occurrence. Watch recurrence -> runtimes.node / runner image.

NEW: Avenger (claude/opus) ran 48.4min then failed turns=0 / empty output — agent-step time-limit while still dispatching Bash+TaskOutput. No safe output emitted. Single occurrence; watch for a stuck TaskOutput poll pattern.

anomalies.title: Docker Hub registry pull timeout cluster (night window)
anomalies.summary: 2 agent-step failures (Smoke CI main, Smoke Codex branch) pulling node:lts-alpine from registry-1.docker.io with context-deadline-exceeded, exit 123, within ~21:05-21:39Z. Transient infra/network, not agent logic. Persistence 1 (single window). Escalate only if it recurs in a future window.
